pageSubtitle: Thank you for your stay at Arden'Nest. To prepare the house for the next guests, we kindly ask you to go through this checklist.
intro: Cleaning is included when all items are checked off — otherwise, additional costs may apply.

general.title: General
general.departureTime: Departure time: 10:00 AM (or 4:00 PM for late check-out)
items: Leave refrigerators and freezers on — do not turn off
Let us know you're leaving (doorbell or WhatsApp/SMS)
Hand in the key or deposit it in the key box

house.title: The House
items: Leave tables clean (don't put chairs on tables)
Vacuum the ground floor: kitchen, living room, salon, entrance, stairwell
Put board games and toys back in their place

kitchen.title: The Kitchen
items: Empty the dishwasher and put away dishes
Wash and put away all kitchen utensils
Clean the stove and oven (dish soap only)
Take food scraps with you (not in garbage bags)
kitchen.tip: Tip: suitable leftovers may go to the chickens!

outside.title: Outside
items: BBQ: ash in the ash bucket, grill cleaned
Put sun loungers and outdoor toys back in their place

bedrooms.title: Bedrooms
items: Do NOT strip the beds (we do this)
Turn off heating in bedrooms and bathrooms

damage.title: Damage or Remarks
damage.content: Accidents happen, we understand. Please note any damage or remarks and report them to us.
damage.depositInfo: The deposit will be refunded within 7 to 14 days after departure.

closing.content: We hope to welcome you again soon. Until next time!
closing.signature: Arden'Nest • Welcoming guests in the Ardennes since 2003
